message:
Add E2E test for scroll repaint black flash regression

New test (sequence-scroll-repaint.e2e.ts):
- Tests for visual regression where scrolling causes momentary black
  flash or excessive black pixels in the canvas
- waitForSequenceReady(): Helper to ensure sequence grid is loaded
- getCanvasBlackPixelRatio(): Captures canvas image and calculates
  percentage of near-black pixels (RGB < 10)
- Tests rapid scroll sequences with thresholds for acceptable black
  pixel ratios during scroll operations

playwright.config.ts:
- Add test configuration for new scroll repaint test suite
- Configure appropriate timeouts for canvas operations

This catches visual glitches from overscan calculation errors or
rendering pipeline issues that cause blank frames during scroll.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
